SEARCH
Package user

Class Manager

java.lang.Object
user.User
user.Manager
public class Manager extends User
It implements the manager of the store
Version:
1.4
Author:
Sofía C.L.

    • createFixedPercentageDiscount

      public FixedPercentageDiscount createFixedPercentageDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, Category... categories)
      The fixed percentage discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      percentage - the discount's percentage
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryFixedPercentage discount

    • createGiftDiscount

      public GiftDiscount createGiftDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double spendingThreshold, StoreProduct gift, Category... categories)
      The gift discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      spendingThreshold - the discount's spending threshold
      gift - the discount's gift
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryGift discount

    • createQuantityDiscount

      public QuantityDiscount createQuantityDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, Category... categories)
      The quantity discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Category
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      numThreshold - the discount's number of purchased products threshold
      deduction - the discount's deduction
      categories - the desired categories
      Returns:
      the new CategoryQuantity discount

    • createFixedPercentageDiscount

      public ProductFixedPercentage createFixedPercentageDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double percentage, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)
      The fixed percentage discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Product
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      percentage - the discount's percentage
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not
      products - the desired products
      Returns:
      the new ProductFixedPercentage discount

    • createGiftDiscount

      public ProductGift createGiftDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double spendingThreshold, StoreProduct gift, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)
      The gift discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Product
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      spendingThreshold - the discount's spending threshold
      gift - the discount's gift
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not
      products - the desired products
      Returns:
      the new ProductGift discount

    • createQuantityDiscount

      public ProductQuantity createQuantityDiscount(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, boolean overWholeStore, StoreProduct... products)
      The quantity discount's constructor with default id whose coverage is Product
      Parameters:
      startDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date
      numThreshold - the discount's number of purchased targetProducts threshold
      deduction - the discount's deduction
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over all the store products or not
      products - the desired products
      Returns:
      the new ProductQuantity discount
